summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dashboard MVP with Budgets and Calendar functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI mostly functional with one minor issue in budget status dropdown selection.

ui_bugs.issue: Status dropdown selection fails when editing budget - timeout selecting 'Aprobado' option
ui_bugs.details: Dropdown opens correctly but selecting 'Aprobado' option times out. May be related to multiple elements with same text or overlay issues.

issues: WebSocket connection errors to ws://localhost:443/ws - expected since testing on localhost
design_issues.details: Expected behavior when testing locally vs production environment

passed_tests: Backend API - All 19 endpoints (100% success rate)
Navigation between all pages (Home, Budgets, Calendar)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix budget status dropdown selection issue in BudgetsPage.jsx - the 'Aprobado' option selection is failing during edit operations. Consider using more specific selectors or checking for overlay/timing issues.
